        2023.

Review the new features introduced to Enterprise Data Loss Prevention (E-DLP) in November
        2023.

metadata.description:
Review the new features introduced to Enterprise Data Loss Prevention (E-DLP) in February
        2025.

metadata.title: October 2021
metadata.description:
Review the new features introduced to Enterprise Data Loss Prevention (E-DLP) in October
        2021.
metadata.keywords: Enterprise DLP Release Notes, Cloud Services - App, Release Notes, Enterprise DLP Release Notes, Data Filtering, Cloud-Delivered Security Services, Enterprise DLP
